vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological failure. There is no evidence of living plant tissue in any of the registered containers.
vision_report.anomalies: The primary anomaly is the complete absence of the expected flora. The 'White Rabbit' anchor is the only non-soil element remaining in the P3/P4 zone.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. My first step was to establish the spatial coordinates of the pots relative to the white rabbit anchor. Upon validation, it is clear that the registry provided does not match the physical reality of the images. All four pots (P1-P4) are currently empty. There is no evidence of the String of Nickels, Mexican Mint, Pothos, or Silver Guest. The environment appears to be a dormant or failed botanical setup.
